title: Device Home Screen - Zoom out the application to verify that it remains the same
scenario: App home screen and Device Settings screen state is preserved after switching away via app switcher and returning to full screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with a connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
2. Ensure the app is on the Home screen.
3. Open the device app switcher (multitasking) and verify the preview shows the Home screen correctly.
4. Tap to return to full screen and verify the app is still on the Home screen with no changes.
5. Tap the "..." (More) button on the Home screen to open Device Settings.
6. Open the device app switcher (multitasking) and verify the preview shows the Device Settings screen correctly.
7. Tap to return to full screen and verify the app is still on the Device Settings screen with no changes.
expected: The app remains on the same screen (Home or Device Settings) after switching away via the app switcher and returning to full screen. The preview in the app switcher correctly shows the current screen.
